assumptions: The intragroup dividend has resulted, or may result, in a foreign-currency-denominated amount relevant in the consolidated financial statements.
The question is limited to identifying the potentially applicable IFRS hedge accounting models for the foreign exchange risk.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognised foreign-currency monetary receivable is a hedged-item candidate within the IFRS 9 hedge accounting model when its exchange differences affect consolidated profit or loss.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 treats highly probable forecast intragroup foreign-currency transactions that affect consolidated profit or loss as a distinct hedge accounting model.
